[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 111001111 7
1 111010111 7
2 000011000 2
3 010111010 5
4 101100010 4
5 111110111 8
6 011111001 6
7 010011010 4

01 10 101100001 4
12 21 111011011 7
23 32 010111001 5
34 43 101001110 5
45 54 110110111 7
56 65 100101101 5
67 76 010101110 5
70 07 101111001 6

02 20 010111010 5 match 3
13 31 101100010 4 match 4
24 42 111110111 8 match 5
35 53 011111001 6 match 6
46 64 010011010 4 match 7
57 75 110000011 4
60 06 111010111 7 match 1
71 17 000011000 2 match 2

14 41 000101100 3
25 52 001000000 1
36 63 111010100 5
47 74 000110100 3
50 05 011111010 6

72 27 111000011 5
